sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45197" key="eu)strofa/ligc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐστροφάλιγξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιγγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n45197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">curly</tr_>, of hair, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.219.18</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
